action_boundary: Should settlement instruction SET-2 be released with the stated variance?
communication_boundary: A visible variance is not enough. Compare the variance to the written tolerance record.

documents.text: Settlement instruction SET-2 requests release after conversion.
Calculation record CALC-2 shows a USD 0.79 variance between the bank quote and worksheet.
Tolerance memo TOL-2 permits variance up to USD 1.00 for this settlement class.
Treasury approval APP-2 binds SET-2, CALC-2, and TOL-2.
Settlement release requires approval and any variance to be inside the written tolerance memo.
